title: dForge Module Webhooks
description: Webhook subscription definitions for a dForge module package (webhooks.json)

entity.description: Entity code that triggers this webhook

event.description: Event type that fires this webhook

condition.description: Formula evaluated against the record. Webhook fires only if true.

endpointUrl.description: Default endpoint URL. Integration modules ship with this pre-configured; admin can override.

secretCd.description: Secret code for API key (from dforge.secret table, admin-configured)

include.description: Field codes to include. If omitted, include all visible fields.

includeOld.description: Include previous field values on update/status_change events

enabled.description: Can be set to false to disable without removing
